name: cortex-plugin-web-scraper
description: Multi-backend web scraping & data extraction — scrape URLs, crawl sites, search the web, extract structured data with schema, monitor pages for changes, and export results. Supports Firecrawl, Tavily, Apify, Bright Data, Oxylabs, Jina AI, Brave, and Exa with automatic failover.
author: CortexPrism

tools.name: scrape_url
tools.description: Scrape a single URL with automatic backend selection and failover. Returns clean structured content in text, markdown, HTML, or screenshot format.

params.name: url
params.description: The URL to scrape (must be HTTP or HTTPS)

params.name: format
params.description: Output format for the scraped content

params.name: selector
params.description: CSS selector to extract specific content from the page

params.name: include_metadata
params.description: Whether to include page metadata (title, description, og tags, links) in the response

params.name: backend
params.description: Preferred scraping backend (auto-detected from available API keys if omitted)

params.name: timeout_seconds
params.description: Timeout in seconds (default: 30)

tools.name: scrape_crawl
tools.description: Crawl a website starting from a URL, following links up to a configurable depth and page limit. Supports path pattern filtering and multi-backend failover.

params.name: start_url
params.description: The starting URL for the crawl

params.name: max_pages
params.description: Maximum number of pages to crawl (default: 10)

params.name: max_depth
params.description: Maximum crawl depth from the start URL (default: 2)

params.name: same_domain
params.description: Only follow links on the same domain as the start URL (default: true)

params.name: path_pattern
params.description: URL path regex pattern to match when following links

params.name: selector
params.description: CSS selector to extract specific content from each crawled page

params.name: backend
params.description: Preferred crawl backend

tools.name: scrape_search
tools.description: Search the web using Tavily, Firecrawl, Brave, or Exa and extract structured results. Requires an API key configured in plugin settings.

params.name: query
params.description: Search query string

params.name: max_results
params.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10)

params.name: engine
params.description: Search engine to use

params.name: scrape_results
params.description: Also scrape each result page for full content

tools.name: scrape_extract_schema
tools.description: Extract structured data from a URL following a JSON schema. Uses pattern matching, DOM heuristics, meta tags, JSON-LD, and itemprop to identify schema fields in the page content.

params.name: url
params.description: The URL to extract structured data from

params.name: schema
params.description: JSON schema string defining the structure to extract (JSON Schema format)

params.name: multiple
params.description: Whether to extract multiple matching items (e.g., list of products) or a single item

params.name: backend
params.description: Extraction backend for AI-powered extraction

tools.name: scrape_status
tools.description: Check the health, rate-limit status, and remaining quota of all configured scraping backends.

tools.name: scrape_monitor
tools.description: Monitor a URL for changes by recording a content hash baseline and checking periodically. Returns whether content has changed since the last check.

params.name: url
params.description: The URL to monitor for changes

params.name: interval_hours
params.description: How often to check for changes in hours (default: 24)

params.name: selector
params.description: CSS selector to monitor only a specific part of the page

tools.name: scrape_export
tools.description: Export scraped data (JSON array of items) to JSON, CSV, or Markdown table format.

params.name: format
params.description: Export format for the data

params.name: data
params.description: JSON array string of scraped items to export

fields.label: API Key
fields.description: API key for Tavily search API (https://tavily.com)

fields.label: API Key
fields.description: API key for Jina AI Reader (https://jina.ai)

fields.label: API Key
fields.description: API key for Brave Search API (https://brave.com/search/api/)

fields.label: API Key
fields.description: API key for Exa search API (https://exa.ai)

fields.label: Default Max Pages
fields.description: Default maximum pages when crawling (global override)

fields.label: User Agent
fields.description: User-Agent header sent with all HTTP requests

fields.label: Request Delay (ms)
fields.description: Delay between requests to avoid rate limiting

tools: Claude Code (Anthropic) — original scaffold and implementation
Kilo (DeepSeek) — merged web-scraping orchestrator features (multi-backend, scrape_status, screenshot)
